title: Build Shopify order attribution webhook handler
completion_summary: Built Shopify order attribution webhook: HMAC verification, 10-day email matching, OrderAttribution + AnalyticsEvent creation, dedup guard, 200 OK for unmatched orders
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/webhooks/shopify/orders accepts Shopify orders/create webhook payload
Verifies Shopify HMAC-SHA256 signature from x-shopify-hmac-sha256 header using env.SHOPIFY_API_SECRET
Extracts shopifyOrderId and orderTotal from webhook payload
Looks up Store by shopifyDomain from webhook payload (X-Shopify-Shop-Domain header or shop_domain field)
Queries submissions for the store ordered by createdAt DESC, limited to last 100, within 10-day attribution window
Matches submission to order by email (case-insensitive) OR sessionId stored in a cart attribute/tracking cookie
If match found, creates OrderAttribution record with storeId, quizId, submissionId, shopifyOrderId, orderTotal
If no match, creates OrderAttribution with storeId, quizId=null, submissionId=null (unattributed order)
Prevents duplicate attribution: checks for existing OrderAttribution with same shopifyOrderId before creating
Returns 200 with { attributed: true/false, submissionId: string|null } on success
Webhook endpoint does NOT require Shopify session cookie (it is called by Shopify servers)
Logs attribution attempts for debugging (e.g., console.log) but does not fail the request on non-critical errors
